seo_title: Houston, TX to Dallas, TX LTL Freight Quotes | WARP
h1: Houston, TX to Dallas, TX LTL freight quotes
meta_description: Compare LTL freight options from Houston, TX to Dallas, TX. Small and mid-size shipping teams get lane-specific estimated pricing, performance data, and a fast, self-serve evaluation workflow.
intro: LTL freight between Houston, TX and Dallas, TX covers one of the shortest metro-to-metro corridors in the network. For small and mid-size shipping teams, that means same-day and next-day options are realistic, last-mile scheduling is tighter, and per-shipment costs stay competitive. This page breaks down transit windows, carrier density, and booking strategies tailored to short-haul LTL shippers on the Houston, TX to Dallas, TX lane.

faq.q: How fast is LTL transit from Houston, TX to Dallas, TX?
faq.a: Short-haul metro lanes like Houston, TX to Dallas, TX typically deliver within 1 business day for LTL, with same-day options available for expedited shipments.

faq.q: How does carrier availability compare on the Houston, TX to Dallas, TX LTL lane?
faq.a: Both Houston, TX and Dallas, TX are metro hubs with deep carrier pools, so capacity is consistent year-round for LTL shipments.

faq.q: Can I schedule last-mile delivery windows for LTL freight arriving in Dallas, TX?
faq.a: Absolutely. Metro destinations like Dallas, TX support appointment-based delivery scheduling for LTL freight, including liftgate and inside delivery.

faq.q: Are same-day LTL pickups available from Houston, TX?
faq.a: Yes. Because Houston, TX and Dallas, TX are both major metros, most carriers offer same-day pickup windows for LTL freight on this corridor.

faq.q: What is the average LTL cost from Houston, TX to Dallas, TX?
faq.a: Short-haul LTL rates on the Houston, TX to Dallas, TX lane are among the lowest per-mile in the network due to the short distance and high carrier density.
